_readme: APPROVED recipe: every knob pinned (a later generic-default change cannot restyle this look). starcomb resolution: CLI > this file > GENERIC.

notes.spcc: narrowband mode on the composed HOO stack: R sees Ha (656.28 nm), G and B both carry OIII (500.7 nm) — the palette assigns one line to two channels, so both get the OIII wavelength; bandwidths left at siril's defaults (the tutorial data's dual-band filter model is unrecorded)
notes.solve: narrow field, solve with a position hint: solve_field.py --ra=270.8 --dec=-23.9 --radius-deg=10; the composed stack is half-size and its doubled XPIXSZ keeps the header-derived scale hint correct
notes.tool_migration: tool-only migration: the in-house numpy corings (chroma_core/lum_core) were removed from the chain, so this recipe no longer applies them — a declared delta. The final saturation, star MTF, black point and screen combine now drive siril (satu/mtf/pm). Look + baseline need re-judgment + rebaseline; this recipe was approved for its denoise/anchor choices, not the corings.

approved.note: scope-ACKED baseline (--ack-color-scope): this emission-flooded class fails the colour gate by scope with the achromatic metrics clean, so colour is tracked one-sided; full colour admission waits on the colour-gate redesign (BACKLOG)
